title: Pan-Seared Spanish Trout
description: A simple and flavorful Spanish-inspired dish featuring pan-seared trout. Serve with a side of crusty bread for a delightful meal.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality extra virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for a more delicate flavor

ingredients.name: Ensalada de tomate
ingredients.notes: A simple salad of diced tomatoes, onions, and olive oil

instructions: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pan and swirl it around.
Add the trout fillets to the pan, skin side up.
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
Flip the trout over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the trout from the pan and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the minced garlic to the pan.
Cook for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the trout with the ensalada de tomate and drizzle with the pan sauce.
